text:
お……おいおい
おたくマジで行くのかよ！？

映像も見たけど
あの爪で切り裂かれたら
痛てーじゃ済まねえぞ！？

それでも行くってんなら止めやしねぇ！
おたくの雄姿は、オレの瞳に
焼きつけておいてや

Pal, hey... listen to me. Are you absolutely,
a hundred percent seriously gonna go!?

I've seen pictures of those claws, pal.
You know what those can do to you?
"Ouch" don't begin to cover it!

If you still wanna go, be my guest! I'll
forever remember how you gallantly
strode off heroically to your doom.
